author.bio:
Assistant Professor at @DrexelCCI 🐉, @WebSciDL + @oducs alum.

Creator of #webarchiving software: WARCreate WAIL Mink ipwb

👑🦁 🄾🄳🅄 ◆ 𝕌𝔽  🐊🐊
author.name: Mat Kelly

content.text:
A toggle built into @brave enables IPFS, which previously required installation of a browser extension.

This seems like it would be a good path for @Mementoweb to pursue to attain native support for Memento in a web browser.

#webarchiving

https://twitter.com/dietrich/status/1181796318504607745

content.text:
We're making significant progress on a distributed web...

Putting you in control of your online experience by integrating IPFS into web browsers.
